loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing current THD and voltage distortion metrics; harmonic order (H5/H7) and flicker/crest factor data are not directly measured for this asset, so those tiles are empty or approximated.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Power Factor and harmonic distortion trends; True PF and PF Gap are approximated or derived from available active power metrics as direct True PF columns are not recorded for this asset.
